name: ShapeGrid
description: A canvas-based animated grid background with configurable shapes (squares, hexagons, circles, triangles) that animate in a chosen direction and respond to mouse hover with fill color effects and optional trails.

direction.description: Direction of the grid animation movement.

borderColor.description: Border/stroke color of each grid shape.

squareSize.description: Size of each grid cell in pixels.

hoverFillColor.description: Fill color applied to shapes on mouse hover.

shape.description: Shape type for each grid cell.

hoverTrailAmount.description: Number of trailing hovered shapes that fade out behind the cursor. 0 disables the trail effect.

examples.title: Hexagon grid with trail
examples.code: <ShapeGrid shape="hexagon" squareSize={50} speed={0.5} borderColor="#444" hoverFillColor="#ee502c" hoverTrailAmount={5} />

aiPromptHint: ShapeGrid fills its parent container with a canvas. Set the parent to have explicit dimensions. Use 'shape' to change between square, hexagon, circle, or triangle. The animation direction and hover effects are the key visual features.
